basic_details.job_title: TANUVAS Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate - 1 Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Project Associate - 1: Bachelor Degree in Microbiology/ Biotechnology/Biochemistry

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.25,000 + HRA/- per month (Without NET) / Rs.31,000 + HRA/- per month (With NET) (Consolidated)
salary_details.details: Rs.25,000 + HRA/- per month (Without NET) or Rs.31,000 + HRA/- per month (With NET) (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TANUVAS Project Associate - 1 Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TANUVAS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TANUVAS Project Associate - 1 Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TANUVAS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Project Associate - 1 Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TANUVAS Project Associate - 1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the TANUVAS Project Associate - 1 position is 20-07-2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - 1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor Degree in Microbiology, Biotechnology, or Biochemistry to be eligible for the Project Associate - 1 position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - 1 role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Associate - 1 position is Rs.25,000 + HRA/- per month (Without NET) or Rs.31,000 + HRA/- per month (With NET) on a consolidated basis.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - 1 post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - 1 post in the Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the TANUVAS Project Associate - 1 recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for the TANUVAS Project Associate - 1 position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for the Project Associate - 1 position. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate - 1 role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate - 1 position at TANUVAS will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Project Associate - 1 position will be conducted at the Department of Veterinary Gynaecology and Obstetrics, Veterinary College and Research Institute, Namakkal - 637 002.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate - 1 position at TANUVAS is a temporary job type.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply via post for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates can also send their filled application in the prescribed format along with supporting documents by post to "The Professor and Head, Department of Veterinary Gynaecology and Obstetrics, Veterinary College and Research Institute, Namakkal - 637 002".
